name: io.github.base76-research-lab/conductor-graph-mcp
description: Exposes a CognOS agent system as a machine-readable graph. Full system snapshot with one tool call.

environmentVariables.name: COGNOS_BASE_URL
environmentVariables.description: URL of the TrustPlane/CognOS gateway (default: http://127.0.0.1:8788)

environmentVariables.name: COGNOS_API_KEY
environmentVariables.description: API key for the CognOS gateway (optional, leave empty if not required)
